name: biodoia-skills-marketplace
description: Curated Claude Code plugin marketplace by biodoia — cyberpunk skills ecosystem

plugins.name: marketplace-creator
plugins.description: Create and manage Claude Code plugin marketplaces — scaffold plugins, manage registries, audit quality, and maintain skill ecosystems with an interactive web creator

plugins.name: tailscale-expert
plugins.description: Expert guidance for Tailscale VPN setup, ACLs, exit nodes, subnet routing, MagicDNS, and troubleshooting

plugins.name: xen-orchestra-expert
plugins.description: Expert guidance for Xen Orchestra (XO) VM management, XCP-ng hypervisor, backups, REST API, and infrastructure automation

plugins.name: skill-master
plugins.description: Intelligent skill ecosystem orchestrator — proactive onboarding via hooks, adaptive growth from usage patterns, MCP tools for search/recommend/analyze/evolve

plugins.name: cli-ai-tools
plugins.description: Expert reference for CLI AI coding assistants — Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Aider, Goose, amp, Copilot CLI, and more with commands, config, and comparison

plugins.name: tmux-expert
plugins.description: Comprehensive tmux terminal multiplexer guide — keybindings, configuration, plugins (TPM), scripting, automation, and cyberpunk-themed configs

plugins.name: manjaro-expert
plugins.description: Comprehensive Manjaro/Arch Linux system management — pacman, AUR, systemd, storage, networking, troubleshooting, and maintenance

plugins.name: grpc-expert
plugins.description: Expert gRPC and Protocol Buffers guide — proto3 syntax, service patterns, Go/Python implementation, buf, grpcurl, interceptors, streaming, and gRPC-Gateway

plugins.name: quic-expert
plugins.description: QUIC protocol and HTTP/3 expert — quic-go, WebTransport, 0-RTT, connection migration, stream multiplexing, deployment, and protocol internals

plugins.name: htmx-expert
plugins.description: HTMX and Hypermedia-Driven Applications expert — core attributes, SSE, WebSocket, OOB swaps, Go/Python integration, patterns cookbook, and _hyperscript

plugins.name: retro-pixel-ui
plugins.description: Retro gaming pixel art UI/UX design — cyberpunk neon, CRT effects, 8-bit/16-bit aesthetics, pixel fonts, RPG components, NES/SNES palettes, and CSS effects library

plugins.name: sdd-steroids
plugins.description: Specification-Driven Development on steroids — pre-planning RECON from HN/daily.dev/lobste.rs, emerging best practices research, agentic patterns, 5-phase workflow with real-time intelligence

plugins.name: multi-lsp
plugins.description: Multi-LSP combiner — auto-detect stack, configure 24+ language servers, generate editor configs for Neovim/VS Code/Helix/Zed, stack presets, install scripts

plugins.name: wayland-multimonitor
plugins.description: Wayland multi-monitor expert — Hyprland, Sway, KDE, GNOME configs, kanshi profiles, fractional scaling, VRR/gaming, screen sharing, Nvidia guide, troubleshooting

plugins.name: toolbox-discovery
plugins.description: System tools discovery & activation — scans 200+ tools across 14 categories, identifies misconfigured or missing tools, applies activation recipes with backup, recommends modern alternatives
